a:r.a:t: Case Study: Specialty chemicals and advanced materials company
What opportunity is at stake to improve pricing at the client?
The CST was conducting an org design study for a ~$1B specialty chemicals company
The team aimed to add quick commercial wins to present to the executive team in addition to org design work
Following initial commercial sizing, the client requested an interactive tool to explore 60+ opportunity cuts dynamically
Extended analysis to sales and growth to model churn and cross-sell, quantifying total commercial opportunity
: Identified significant opportunity to grow revenue by addressing churn and cross-sell
through targeted pricing analysis on customer and product longtail, margin variability, & non-KVI
with CXO and Pricing Director to explore deeper diagnostic insights and technology enablement
